title: CTA Logging Schema
description: Schema for log entries produced by CTA services

epoch_time.description: Unix epoch timestamp in seconds, including fractional seconds.

local_time.description: Local timestamp of the log entry formatted as YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS±HHMM.

log_schema_version.description: Version identifier of the log schema.

hostname.description: Hostname of the machine or container where the log entry was generated.

program.description: Name of the CTA service or component emitting the log entry.

log_level.description: Severity level of the log entry following syslog-style severity levels.

pid.description: Process identifier of the program instance that generated the log entry.

tid.description: Thread identifier within the process that generated the log entry.

message.description: Human-readable log message describing the event.
